last_action: Implementation + baseline benchmarks with 30 replications per config
next_action: adversarial testing (Stage 3) -- concurrent writers, WAL corruption, large batch stress

history.description: Created experiment structure, beginning literature review and implementation

Literature review (20 papers/sources), implemented PersistentQueue with WAL + BatchAggregator, ran 5-phase benchmark suite (30 reps each), determinism tests (450/450), crash recovery tests (150/150). All hypothesis targets confirmed with large margins.
